hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【WORLD】与以色列的停火给黎巴嫩带来了喘息之机，但和平的障碍仍然存在；【CRYPTO】扭亏为盈：随着比特币涨至 77,000 美元，策略飙升 8%，使持有的股票获利；【FINANCE】如果市场剧烈下滑，新的 ETF 策略可能会很脆弱。这就是为什么。

items.title: Ceasefire with Israel brings respite to Lebanon, but obstacles to peace remain
items.summary: The halt to weeks of fighting is being celebrated in Lebanon, but it will be difficult to ensure it lasts.
items.title_zh: 与以色列的停火给黎巴嫩带来了喘息之机，但和平的障碍仍然存在
items.summary_zh: 黎巴嫩正在庆祝战斗已停止数周，但很难确保这种情况持续下去。

items.title: Back in the black: Strategy surges 8% as bitcoin's rise to $77,000 puts holdings in profit
items.summary: Bitcoin climbed above its 100-day moving average, while Strategy moves back above its 200-week trend level.
items.title_zh: 扭亏为盈：随着比特币涨至 77,000 美元，策略飙升 8%，使持有的股票获利
items.summary_zh: 比特币攀升至 100 日移动均线上方，而 Strategy 则回到 200 周趋势水平上方。

items.title: If a violent downturn strikes the market, new ETF strategies may be vulnerable. Here's why
items.summary: Innovation in the exchange-traded fund industry could come at a cost to investors during extreme volatility.
items.title_zh: 如果市场剧烈下滑，新的 ETF 策略可能会很脆弱。这就是为什么
items.summary_zh: 在极端波动期间，交易所交易基金行业的创新可能会让投资者付出代价。

items.title: Bank of America tops estimates as CEO Brian Moynihan says consumer banking is 'healthy'
items.summary: Bank of America, the second-largest U.S. bank by assets, has topped expectations for earnings per share for 23 consecutive quarters.
items.title_zh: 美国银行首席执行官布赖恩·莫伊尼汉表示消费银行业务“健康”，高于预期
items.summary_zh: 美国银行是美国资产第二大银行，其每股收益连续 23 个季度超出预期。

items.title: Chinese robotaxi companies forge ahead with UAE expansion despite Iran war
items.summary: Ride-hailing company Didi plans to begin its first overseas robotaxi test in the United Arab Emirates later this year.
items.title_zh: 尽管伊朗战争，中国机器人出租车公司仍继续在阿联酋扩张
items.summary_zh: 网约车公司滴滴计划今年晚些时候在阿拉伯联合酋长国开始其首次海外机器人出租车测试。

items.title: Prediction markets will grow to $1 trillion by 2030, Bernstein estimates
items.summary: The investment bank said volumes will reach an estimated $240 billion in 2026 and grow at a 80% compound annual rate between 2025 and 2030.
items.title_zh: Bernstein 估计，到 2030 年，预测市场将增长到 1 万亿美元
items.summary_zh: 该投资银行表示，预计 2026 年交易量将达到 2400 亿美元，并在 2025 年至 2030 年间以 80% 的复合年增长率增长。

items.title: Lutnick Says Canada Trade Deal Needs to Be Reworked Ahead of Talks
items.summary: Howard Lutnick, President Trump’s commerce secretary, derided Canada’s trade strategy and said a North American deal needed to be reworked.
items.title_zh: 卢特尼克表示加拿大贸易协议需要在谈判前重新制定
items.summary_zh: 特朗普总统的商务部长霍华德·卢特尼克嘲笑加拿大的贸易战略，并表示北美协议需要重新制定。

items.title: Introducing GPT-Rosalind for life sciences research
items.summary: OpenAI introduces GPT-Rosalind, a frontier reasoning model built to accelerate drug discovery, genomics analysis, protein reasoning, and scientific research workflows.
items.title_zh: 引入 GPT-Rosalind 用于生命科学研究
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 推出了 GPT-Rosalind，这是一种前沿推理模型，旨在加速药物发现、基因组分析、蛋白质推理和科学研究工作流程。

items.title: Live Updates: Thousands of Lebanese Try to Head Home After Israel-Lebanon Truce
items.summary: Hezbollah, the Iran-backed militia Israeli forces are battling in Lebanon, avoided mention of the 10-day cease-fire but appeared to be adhering to it. A truce could remove an obstacle in U.S.-Iran peace talks.
items.title_zh: 实时更新：以色列-黎巴嫩停战后，数千名黎巴嫩人试图回家
items.summary_zh: 真主党是伊朗支持的以色列民兵组织，正在黎巴嫩作战，该组织避免提及为期 10 天的停火协议，但似乎正在遵守该协议。休战可以消除美伊和平谈判的障碍。

items.title: Iran War Live Updates: Tehran Declares Strait ‘Open’ but Trump Says U.S. Blockade on Iran Continues
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争实时更新：德黑兰宣布海峡“开放”，但特朗普称美国继续封锁伊朗

items.title: Beaten-down digital asset treasury names lead crypto stock surge as bitcoin hits $78,000
items.summary: Oil prices slumped as Trump said Iran committed to open the Strait of Hormuz and the U.S. plans to acquire that country's enriched uranium as part of a deal.
items.title_zh: 比特币触及 78,000 美元，遭受打击的数字资产国债公司引领加密货币股票飙升
items.summary_zh: 由于特朗普表示伊朗承诺开放霍尔木兹海峡，并且美国计划作为协议的一部分获取该国的浓缩铀，油价暴跌。

items.title: Bitcoin rises past $76,000, aiming at major breakout as oil plunges on Iran cooldown
items.summary: Iran's foreign minister said the Strait of Hormuz will remain completely open for the remainder of the ceasefire.
items.title_zh: 伊朗降温导致油价暴跌，比特币涨破76,000美元，有望实现重大突破
items.summary_zh: 伊朗外长表示，在停火协议剩余时间内，霍尔木兹海峡将保持完全开放。

items.title: Bitcoin’s ceasefire boost is starting to fizzle out as investors look for real-world results
items.summary: What you need to know for April 17, 2026
items.title_zh: 随着投资者寻找现实世界的结果，比特币的停火推动开始消失
items.summary_zh: 2026 年 4 月 17 日您需要了解的信息

items.title: Bitcoin stalls below $76,000 as sell wall caps rally despite rising derivatives activity
items.summary: The bitcoin price is hovering near a key resistance level with $450 million in sell orders overhead as liquidations surge and derivatives data signal caution.
items.title_zh: 尽管衍生品活动不断增加，但由于抛售上限反弹，比特币仍跌破 76,000 美元
items.summary_zh: 由于清算激增和衍生品数据发出谨慎信号，比特币价格徘徊在关键阻力位附近，卖出订单开销高达 4.5 亿美元。

items.title: Congresswoman Biggs discloses six-figure BlackRock bitcoin ETF buy as BTC rebounds
items.summary: Rep. Sheri Biggs disclosed a purchase of up to $250,000 in BlackRock’s iShares Bitcoin Trust ETF for the second time in a year.
items.title_zh: 国会女议员比格斯透露，随着比特币反弹，贝莱德买入了六位数的比特币 ETF
items.summary_zh: 众议员 Sheri Biggs 披露，一年内第二次购买了贝莱德 iShares 比特币信托 ETF，金额高达 25 万美元。

items.title: Codex for (almost) everything
items.summary: The updated Codex app for macOS and Windows adds computer use, in-app browsing, image generation, memory, and plugins to accelerate developer workflows.
items.title_zh: （几乎）所有内容的法典
items.summary_zh: 适用于 macOS 和 Windows 的更新后的 Codex 应用程序增加了计算机使用、应用程序内浏览、图像生成、内存和插件，以加速开发人员工作流程。

items.title: Jacob Andreas and Brett McGuire named Edgerton Award winners
items.summary: The associate professors of EECS and chemistry, respectively, are honored for exceptional contributions to teaching, research, and service at MIT.
items.title_zh: 雅各布·安德烈亚斯和布雷特·麦奎尔被评为埃哲顿奖获得者
items.summary_zh: EECS 和化学副教授分别因对麻省理工学院的教学、研究和服务做出的杰出贡献而受到表彰。

items.title: Human-machine teaming dives underwater
items.summary: Researchers are developing hardware and algorithms to improve collaboration between divers and autonomous underwater vehicles engaged in maritime missions.
items.title_zh: 人机协作潜入水下
items.summary_zh: 研究人员正在开发硬件和算法，以改善潜水员和执行海上任务的自主水下航行器之间的协作。

items.title: Helping data centers deliver higher performance with less hardware
items.summary: Researchers developed a system that intelligently balances workloads to improve the efficiency of flash storage hardware in a data center.
items.title_zh: 帮助数据中心以更少的硬件提供更高的性能
items.summary_zh: 研究人员开发了一种智能平衡工作负载的系统，以提高数据中心闪存存储硬件的效率。

items.title: Retail traders pile into Allbirds after odd AI pivot. History shows it won't end well
items.summary: This surge of speculative buying reflects a broader return of animal spirits among small traders.
items.title_zh: 在奇怪的人工智能转向之后，零售交易员纷纷涌入 Allbirds。历史表明它不会有好结局
items.summary_zh: 投机性买盘的激增反映出小贸易商的动物精神更广泛地回归。

items.title: Jamie Dimon says Anthropic's Mythos reveals 'a lot more vulnerabilities' for cyberattacks
items.summary: The remarks show how a technology welcomed by corporations as a productivity boon can also pose serious threats, like uncovering new ways to hack into systems.
items.title_zh: 杰米·戴蒙 (Jamie Dimon) 表示，Anthropic 的神话揭示了网络攻击的“更多漏洞”
items.summary_zh: 这些言论表明，一项因提高生产力而受到企业欢迎的技术也可能带来严重威胁，例如发现侵入系统的新方法。

items.title: Oil prices plunge as Iran says Strait 'open'
items.summary: Brent crude sinks by a tenth after Iran says the key waterway is open for commercial ships for the rest of the ceasefire.
items.title_zh: 伊朗称海峡“开放”，油价暴跌
items.summary_zh: 在伊朗表示在停火剩余时间内主要水道对商船开放后，布伦特原油价格下跌了十分之一。

items.title: Thousands celebrate open-air Mass with Pope Leo in Cameroon - in pictures
items.summary: Pope Leo XIV is on his third day in Cameroon before he heads to Angola on Saturday.
items.title_zh: 数千人在喀麦隆与教皇利奥一起庆祝露天弥撒 - 图片中
items.summary_zh: 教皇利奥十四世已经是在喀麦隆的第三天了，他将于周六前往安哥拉。

items.title: Irish fugitive and suspected crime boss Daniel Kinahan arrested in Dubai
items.summary: Kinahan, in his 40s, was arrested in Dubai on foot of an arrest warrant issued by the Irish courts.
items.title_zh: 爱尔兰逃犯、犯罪嫌疑人丹尼尔·基纳汉在迪拜被捕
items.summary_zh: 40 多岁的基纳汉根据爱尔兰法院发出的逮捕令在迪拜被捕。

items.title: The 27-Year-Old Diplomat Waging Trump’s Cultural War With Europe
items.summary: Five years out of college, Samuel Samson has driven the Trump administration’s push to upend America’s postwar relationship with Europe.
items.title_zh: 27岁外交官向欧洲发动特朗普文化战
items.summary_zh: 大学毕业五年后，塞缪尔·萨姆森推动了特朗普政府颠覆美国与欧洲战后关系的努力。

items.title: ‘I Just Want to Be Back’: Thousands Rush South in Lebanon Under Cease-Fire
items.summary: Stuck in standstill traffic, Lebanese people who had been displaced by fighting expressed a mix of excitement and uncertainty about a pause in Israel’s campaign against Hezbollah.
items.title_zh: “我只想回来”：数千人在停火协议下涌向黎巴嫩南部
items.summary_zh: 由于交通堵塞，因战斗而流离失所的黎巴嫩民众对以色列暂停打击真主党的行动表达了既兴奋又不确定的心情。

items.title: Iran War Forces America’s Friends in Asia to Court Its Rivals
items.summary: The severe disruption of oil supplies from the Middle East as a result of the war has prompted South Korea and the Philippines to make deals with Russia and Iran.
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争迫使美国在亚洲的朋友向其竞争对手示好
items.summary_zh: 战争导致中东石油供应严重中断，促使韩国和菲律宾与俄罗斯和伊朗达成协议。

items.title: Lebanon Cease-Fire Leaves Netanyahu in an Uncomfortable Spot
items.summary: Most Israelis wanted the fight against Hezbollah to continue. But Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu’s critics say he is showing that he cannot, or will not, stand up to President Trump.
items.title_zh: 黎巴嫩停火让内塔尼亚胡陷入尴尬境地
items.summary_zh: 大多数以色列人希望继续打击真主党。但总理本杰明·内塔尼亚胡的批评者表示，他正在表明他不能或不会对抗特朗普总统。

items.title: ‘I Would Rather Be a Dwarf’: A Comic in Botswana Prizes His Difference
items.summary: Johnson Masase has found local fame, and self acceptance, through performances that play on people’s ignorance about his genetic condition and his 3-foot-4 inch frame.
items.title_zh: “我宁愿做一个侏儒”：博茨瓦纳的一位漫画家赞扬他的与众不同
items.summary_zh: 约翰逊·马塞 (Johnson Masase) 通过利用人们对他的遗传状况和 3 英尺 4 英寸身高的无知的表演，在当地赢得了声誉和自我认可。

items.title: France's finance minister calls for more euro stablecoins in sign of government policy shift
items.summary: The statements signal a potential shift in stance within the French government and its central bank.

items.summary_zh: 这些声明标志着法国政府及其央行内部立场可能发生转变。

items.title: Kraken's parent company Payward to acquire derivatives exchange Bitnomial for $550 million in cash and stock
items.summary: The deal gives Payward control of a fully licensed U.S. crypto derivatives stack, accelerating its expansion in regulated markets.

items.summary_zh: 这笔交易使无限循环发展有限公司获得了完全许可的美国加密货币衍生品堆栈的控制权，从而加速了其在受监管市场的扩张。

items.title: French minister urges banks to expand euro stablecoins, tokenized deposits: report
items.summary: French minister urges European banks to expand euro stablecoins and tokenized deposits as dollar-pegged supply tops $300 billion.

items.summary_zh: 由于与美元挂钩的供应量超过 3000 亿美元，法国部长敦促欧洲银行扩大欧元稳定币和代币化存款。

items.title: Kraken parent Payward agrees to acquire Bitnomial for up to $550 million
items.summary: Kraken parent Payward has agreed to buy Bitnomial for up to $550 million, securing a fully CFTC-licensed U.S. crypto derivatives venue.

items.title: Bringing AI-driven protein-design tools to biologists everywhere

items.title: New technique makes AI models leaner and faster while they’re still learning

items.title: Multimodal Embedding & Reranker Models with Sentence Transformers
items.title_zh: 带有句子变压器的多模态嵌入和重新排序模型

items.title: A new way to explore the web with AI Mode in Chrome
items.summary: Today’s upgrades for AI Mode in Chrome transform how you interact with the web
items.title_zh: 通过 Chrome 中的 AI 模式探索网络的新方式
items.summary_zh: 今天 Chrome 中 AI 模式的升级改变了您与网络交互的方式

items.title: The latest AI news we announced in March 2026
items.summary: Here are Google’s latest AI updates from March 2026
items.title_zh: 我们于 2026 年 3 月公布的最新 AI 新闻
items.summary_zh: 以下是 Google 自 2026 年 3 月起最新的 AI 更新

items.title: A philosophy of work
items.summary: As the NC Ethics of Technology Postdoctoral Fellow, Michal Masny is advancing dialogue, teaching, and research into the social and ethical dimensions of new computing technologies.
items.title_zh: 工作哲学
items.summary_zh: 作为北卡罗来纳州技术伦理学博士后研究员，Michal Masny 正在推进新计算技术的社会和伦理层面的对话、教学和研究。

items.title: Evaluating the ethics of autonomous systems
items.summary: MIT researchers developed a testing framework that pinpoints situations where AI decision-support systems are not treating people and communities fairly.
items.title_zh: 评估自治系统的伦理
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院的研究人员开发了一个测试框架，可以查明人工智能决策支持系统不公平对待人和社区的情况。

items.title: Goldman Sachs bond traders stumbled as Wall Street rivals thrived: 'A fire is being lit under' them
items.summary: Goldman's identity as a trader's firm — one expected to perform in turbulent markets — makes any stumble in the division notable.
items.title_zh: 高盛债券交易员跌跌撞撞，而华尔街竞争对手却蓬勃发展：“他们的底下正在点燃一把火”
items.summary_zh: 高盛作为交易商公司的身份——预计将在动荡的市场中表现出色——使得该部门的任何失误都引人注目。

items.title: Regulators are reportedly zeroing in on suspicious trades ahead of market-moving Trump post
items.summary: The information sought includes so-called Tag 50 identifiers, which can be used to determine who was behind the trades.
items.title_zh: 据报道，在特朗普发表影响市场的言论之前，监管机构正在重点关注可疑交易
items.summary_zh: 寻求的信息包括所谓的 Tag 50 标识符，可用于确定交易背后的人员。

items.title: Morgan Stanley tops estimates as trading revenue exceeds expectations by nearly $1 billion
items.summary: Morgan Stanley's results in the quarter were powered by the firm's fixed income and equities trading operations, which produced about $8.5 billion in revenue.
items.title_zh: 摩根士丹利交易收入超预期近 10 亿美元，超出预期
items.summary_zh: 摩根士丹利本季度的业绩得益于该公司的固定收益和股票交易业务，产生了约 85 亿美元的收入。

items.title: David Einhorn signals caution as his hedge fund Greenlight prioritizes capital protection
items.summary: "It probably won't surprise anyone that we are again putting capital preservation at the top of our priorities," Einhorn said in his latest investor letter.
items.title_zh: 大卫·艾因霍恩 (David Einhorn) 表示谨慎，他的对冲基金 Greenlight 优先考虑资本保护
items.summary_zh: 艾因霍恩在最新的投资者信中表示：“我们再次将资本保值作为我们的首要任务，这可能不会令任何人感到惊讶。”

items.title: Mugabe's son pleads guilty to pointing a gun in South Africa
items.summary: Bellarmine Mugabe was arrested in February following the shooting of a 23-year-old man at his home in Johannesburg.
items.title_zh: 穆加贝之子承认在南非持枪指控
items.summary_zh: 贝拉明·穆加贝 (Bellarmine Mugabe) 于 2 月份在约翰内斯堡的家中枪击一名 23 岁男子后被捕。

items.title: Palestinians hand over suspect in 1982 attack on Jewish restaurant in Paris
items.summary: Hicham Harb is suspected of directing the attack in the Rue des Rosiers and acting as one of the gunmen who shot at diners.
items.title_zh: 巴勒斯坦人移交 1982 年巴黎犹太餐厅袭击案嫌疑人
items.summary_zh: 希查姆·哈布 (Hicham Harb) 涉嫌指挥了玫瑰街的袭击，并且是向食客开枪的枪手之一。

items.title: Widow, 86, back in France after being held by ICE
items.summary: Marie-Thérèse had moved to the US after reuniting with her long-lost love, an American man who died in January.
items.title_zh: 86 岁寡妇被 ICE 拘留后返回法国
items.summary_zh: 玛丽-泰蕾兹在与失散多年的爱人（一名于一月份去世的美国男子）重聚后移居美国。

items.title: Singer D4vd arrested on suspicion of murdering teenage girl
items.summary: The remains of 14-year-old Celeste Rivas Hernandez were found in the singer's car last year.
items.title_zh: 歌手 D4vd 因涉嫌谋杀少女被捕
items.summary_zh: 去年，14 岁的塞莱斯特·里瓦斯·埃尔南德斯 (Celeste Rivas Hernandez) 的遗体在这位歌手的车里被发现。

items.title: Runaway wolf finally captured after nine-day search in South Korea
items.summary: The search has been marked by twists and turns, gripping South Korea and even inspiring a meme coin.
items.title_zh: 韩国搜寻9天后终于抓获逃跑的狼
items.summary_zh: 这次搜寻过程一波三折，牵动着韩国的心，甚至还引发了一种迷因币的诞生。

items.title: Iranian footballers say Australia has given them 'hope' for safe future
items.summary: The duo had sought aslyum after their football team did not sing the national anthem during a match.
items.title_zh: 伊朗足球运动员表示澳大利亚给了他们安全未来的“希望”
items.summary_zh: 由于他们的足球队在比赛中没有唱国歌，两人寻求庇护。

items.title: Trump Tries to Stop Drug Smuggling From South America. Drug Smugglers Invent New Tactics.
items.summary: Authorities are using drones, troops and A.I. to crack down on cocaine smuggling. But gangs are finding new ways to move record amounts of drugs across the world.
items.title_zh: 特朗普试图阻止南美洲的毒品走私。毒品走私者发明新策略。
items.summary_zh: 当局正在使用无人机、军队和人工智能。打击可卡因走私。但犯罪团伙正在寻找新的方法在世界各地运送创纪录数量的毒品。

items.title: Starmer Fires Senior U.K. Civil Servant Over Mandelson Revelations
items.summary: Prime Minister Keir Starmer’s office confirmed that Peter Mandelson, a Jeffrey Epstein associate, failed security checks before he became Britain’s envoy to Washington.
items.title_zh: 斯塔默因曼德尔森泄密事件解雇英国高级公务员
items.summary_zh: 英国首相基尔·斯塔默办公室证实，杰弗里·爱泼斯坦的助手彼得·曼德尔森在成为英国驻华盛顿特使之前未通过安全检查。

items.title: Don’t get AI agents and stablecoin transfers? Enroll in CoinDesk University
items.summary: CoinDesk University’s School of Stablecoin and Agentic Commerce will give you the tools to move beyond understanding to action.
items.title_zh: 没有人工智能代理和稳定币转账？注册 CoinDesk 大学
items.summary_zh: CoinDesk 大学的稳定币和代理商务学院将为您提供从理解到行动的工具。

items.title: X exec says Cashtags crypto, stock token feature has driven $1 billion in trading volume
items.summary: The Cashtags feature aligns with Musk's broader ambitions to transform X into a super app.
items.title_zh: X 高管表示，Cashtags 加密货币、股票代币功能已带动 10 亿美元的交易量
items.summary_zh: Cashtags 功能符合马斯克将 X 转变为超级应用程序的更广泛雄心。

items.title: Crypto Council for Innovation adds Digital Energy Council as its first energy-focused member
items.summary: CCI is adding the Digital Energy Council to its roster, marking the first member dedicated specifically to digital energy policy.
items.title_zh: 加密创新委员会增加数字能源委员会作为其第一个以能源为重点的成员
items.summary_zh: CCI 将数字能源委员会纳入其名册，这是第一个专门致力于数字能源政策的成员。

items.title: Sen. Blumenthal presses DOJ and Treasury on Binance monitor amid Iran sanctions concerns
items.summary: Blumenthal asked about the status of a monitor put in place after Binance pleaded guilty and if that person had filed any misconduct reports.
items.title_zh: 由于伊朗制裁担忧，布卢门撒尔参议员就币安监控向司法部和财政部施压
items.summary_zh: 布卢门撒尔询问了币安认罪后设立的监察员的状况，以及该人是否提交了任何不当行为报告。

items.title: Circle rolls out USDC Bridge for native cross-chain stablecoin transfers
items.summary: USDC Bridge is Circle’s official, native cross-chain bridging solution powered by its Cross-Chain Transfer Protocol.
items.title_zh: Circle 推出 USDC Bridge 以实现原生跨链稳定币转账
items.summary_zh: USDC Bridge 是 Circle 的官方原生跨链桥接解决方案，由其跨链传输协议提供支持。

items.title: Polish PM says crypto firm tied to Russian mafia and secret service backed political rivals
items.summary: The comments came during a parliamentary vote to overrule the Polish president's vetoing of crypto legislation.
items.title_zh: 波兰总理表示与俄罗斯黑手党和特勤局有联系的加密公司支持政治对手
items.summary_zh: 这些言论是在议会投票否决波兰总统否决加密立法期间发表的。

items.title: Accelerating the cyber defense ecosystem that protects us all
items.summary: Leading security firms and enterprises join OpenAI’s Trusted Access for Cyber, using GPT-5.4-Cyber and $10M in API grants to strengthen global cyber defense.
items.title_zh: 加速保护我们所有人的网络防御生态系统
items.summary_zh: 领先的安全公司和企业加入 OpenAI 的网络可信访问，利用 GPT-5.4-Cyber​​ 和 1000 万美元的 API 拨款来加强全球网络防御。

items.title: Trusted access for the next era of cyber defense
items.summary: OpenAI expands its Trusted Access for Cyber program, introducing GPT-5.4-Cyber to vetted defenders and strengthening safeguards as AI cybersecurity capabilities advance.
items.title_zh: 下一个网络防御时代的可信访问
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 扩展了其可信网络访问计划，向经过审查的防御者引入 GPT-5.4-Cyber​​，并随着 AI 网络安全能力的进步而加强保障措施。

items.title: Enterprises power agentic workflows in Cloudflare Agent Cloud with OpenAI
items.summary: Cloudflare brings OpenAI’s GPT-5.4 and Codex to Agent Cloud, enabling enterprises to build, deploy, and scale AI agents for real-world tasks with speed and security.
items.title_zh: 企业通过 OpenAI 为 Cloudflare Agent Cloud 中的代理工作流程提供支持
items.summary_zh: Cloudflare 将 OpenAI 的 GPT-5.4 和 Codex 引入 Agent Cloud，使企业能够快速、安全地构建、部署和扩展用于实际任务的 AI 代理。

items.title: Healthcare
items.summary: Explore how clinicians use ChatGPT to support diagnosis, documentation, and patient care with secure, HIPAA-compliant AI tools.
items.title_zh: 卫生保健
items.summary_zh: 探索临床医生如何使用 ChatGPT 通过安全、符合 HIPAA 的 AI 工具来支持诊断、记录和患者护理。

items.title: Our response to the Axios developer tool compromise
items.summary: OpenAI responds to the Axios supply chain attack by rotating macOS code signing certificates, updating apps, and confirming no user data was compromised.
items.title_zh: 我们对 Axios 开发者工具妥协的回应
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 通过轮换 macOS 代码签名证书、更新应用程序并确认没有用户数据受到损害来响应 Axios 供应链攻击。

items.title: Ecom-RLVE: Adaptive Verifiable Environments for E-Commerce Conversational Agents
items.title_zh: Ecom-RLVE：电子商务会话代理的自适应可验证环境

items.title: The PR you would have opened yourself
items.title_zh: 你自己开的 PR

items.title: Inside VAKRA: Reasoning, Tool Use, and Failure Modes of Agents
items.title_zh: VAKRA 内部：代理的推理、工具使用和故障模式

items.title: Meet HoloTab by HCompany. Your AI browser companion.
items.title_zh: 了解 HCompany 的 HoloTab。您的人工智能浏览器伴侣。

items.title: Waypoint-1.5: Higher-Fidelity Interactive Worlds for Everyday GPUs
items.title_zh: Waypoint-1.5：适用于日常 GPU 的更高保真度交互世界

items.title: Safetensors is Joining the PyTorch Foundation
items.title_zh: Safetensors 即将加入 PyTorch 基金会

items.title: Welcome Gemma 4: Frontier multimodal intelligence on device
items.title_zh: 欢迎 Gemma 4：设备上的前沿多模式智能

items.title: 7 ways to travel smarter this summer, with help from Google
items.summary: The latest tools from Google can help you plan trips, find a great deal and explore your next destination.
items.title_zh: 在 Google 的帮助下，今年夏天智能出行的 7 种方式
items.summary_zh: Google 的最新工具可以帮助您计划旅行、找到超值优惠并探索下一个目的地。

items.title: Gemini 3.1 Flash TTS: the next generation of expressive AI speech
items.summary: Gemini 3.1 Flash TTS is now available across Google products.
items.title_zh: Gemini 3.1 Flash TTS：下一代富有表现力的人工智能语音
items.summary_zh: Gemini 3.1 Flash TTS 现已在 Google 产品中提供。

items.title: Turn your best AI prompts into one-click tools in Chrome
items.summary: Skills in Chrome let you discover, save and remix AI workflows — and repeat them instantly.
items.title_zh: 将您最好的 AI 提示变成 Chrome 中的一键式工具
items.summary_zh: Chrome 中的技能可让您发现、保存和重新混合 AI 工作流程 - 并立即重复它们。

items.title: Bringing people together at AI for the Economy Forum
items.summary: Google is bringing people together in Washington D.C. at our AI for the Economy Forum.
items.title_zh: 人工智能经济论坛将人们聚集在一起
items.summary_zh: 谷歌将人们聚集在华盛顿特区，参加我们的人工智能经济论坛。

items.title: New ways to balance cost and reliability in the Gemini API
items.summary: Google is introducing two new inference tiers to the Gemini API, Flex and Priority, to balance cost and latency.
items.title_zh: Gemini API 中平衡成本和可靠性的新方法
items.summary_zh: Google 正在为 Gemini API 引入两个新的推理层：Flex 和 Priority，以平衡成本和延迟。

items.title: Create, edit and share videos at no cost in Google Vids
items.summary: New AI capabilities are coming to Google Vids, powered by Lyria 3 and Veo 3.1, like high-quality video generation at no cost and more.
items.title_zh: 在 Google Vids 中免费创建、编辑和分享视频
items.summary_zh: 由 Lyria 3 和 Veo 3.1 提供支持的 Google Vids 即将推出新的 AI 功能，例如免费生成高质量视频等。

items.title: We’re creating a new satellite imagery map to help protect Brazil’s forests.
items.summary: Google partnered with the Brazilian government on a satellite imagery map to help protect the country’s forests.
items.title_zh: 我们正在创建新的卫星图像地图，以帮助保护巴西的森林。
items.summary_zh: 谷歌与巴西政府合作开发卫星图像地图，以帮助保护该国的森林。

items.title: Q&A: MIT SHASS and the future of education in the age of AI
items.summary: As the School of Humanities, Arts, and Social Sciences marks 75 years, Dean Agustín Rayo reflects on how AI is reshaping higher education and why SHASS disciplines continue to be central to MIT’s mission.
items.title_zh: 问答：MIT SHASS 和人工智能时代教育的未来
items.summary_zh: 在人文、艺术和社会科学学院成立 75 周年之际，院长 Agustín Rayo 反思了人工智能如何重塑高等教育，以及为什么 SHASS 学科仍然是麻省理工学院使命的核心。

items.title: Sixteen new START.nano companies are developing hard-tech solutions with the support of MIT.nano
items.summary: Startup accelerator program grows to over 30 companies, almost half of them with MIT pedigrees.
items.title_zh: 十六家新的 START.nano 公司正在 MIT.nano 的支持下开发硬技术解决方案
items.summary_zh: 创业加速器计划已发展到超过 30 家公司，其中几乎一半拥有 MIT 出身。

items.title: Working to advance the nuclear renaissance
items.summary: Dean Price, assistant professor in the Department of Nuclear Science and Engineering, sees a bright future for nuclear power, and believes AI can help us realize that vision.
items.title_zh: 致力于推进核复兴
items.summary_zh: 核科学与工程系助理教授 Dean Price 看到了核电的光明前景，并相信人工智能可以帮助我们实现这一愿景。
